title: Highway Toll Gantries: Sensor Coverage on the Strip
strategies: single center row of equal disks along the centerline (reproduces the checker baseline)
two offset rows using the road width so each disk grows larger for the same disk budget
sweep the row count R ~ sqrt(N*W/L), offset-lattice, grow each disk to the max feasible radius routing around pylons
boundary/obstacle-aware unequal packing that enlarges disks in pylon-free gaps
